source_pr.title: backup: fix the lost empty database
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/33866

Problem Summary:
1. Fix a bug that when backup multiple empty databases may lost some empty databases. which catch by https://ci.pingcap.net/blue/organizations/jenkins/br_ghpr_unit_and_integration_test/detail/br_ghpr_unit_and_integration_test/11546/pipeline/
2. Fix unstable github action  by upgrade go image to 1.18. https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/runs/6353214189?check_suite_focus=true

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory

Documentation

- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

symptoms: backup: fix the lost empty database
failure_signature: Backup may lose empty databases when multiple empty DBs exist (e.g., empty DB placeholder keyed by a constant can be overwritten).
root_cause_explanation: The backup metadata reader stored the empty-database placeholder `Table` in a map using a constant key (`tableMap[0]`), so when multiple empty databases were present, later entries could overwrite earlier ones and cause some empty DBs to be lost. The patch stabilizes the behavior by keying the placeholder by `dbInfo.ID` instead, and extends the integration test (`br_backup_empty`) to create multiple empty databases to cover this scenario.
fix_pattern: Fix empty-DB placeholder collision: use `dbInfo.ID` as the map key instead of a constant (`0`), and extend the `br_backup_empty` test to cover multiple empty databases.

evidence: evidence: br: fix unstable backup empty test
